evals.prompt: How does ADS Lozenge map to VPK? I see there's a lozenge.tsx in components/ui — what ADS visual states does it need and what's the mapping?
evals.expected_output: Mapping table showing ADS Lozenge variants to VPK lozenge variants, visual state analysis, identification of token gaps

evals.prompt: Enrich the VPK tooltip component with proper ADS visual styling. It should have the right shadow elevation, background tokens, and match ADS Tooltip visuals.
evals.expected_output: Modified tooltip.tsx with ADS tokens applied (correct shadow elevation, background, text colors), preserved shadcn API

evals.prompt: Map ADS Badge to VPK badge component — full enrichment with ADS state tokens and create variant demo files that mirror the ADS docs examples structure.
evals.expected_output: Enriched badge.tsx with ADS tokens, variant demo files created, demos registered, lint/typecheck passing
